response.justification: Highly experienced fullstack engineer with ~15 years across web, mobile, and backend, well above the 6+ year bar. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), which maps cleanly onto the primary stack and the AI agent requirement. Strong testing/TDD culture, multi-language fluency, MongoDB/Docker/Kubernetes exposure, and React experience from Optilyz round out the profile. Gaps are mostly nice-to-haves (no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or PostgreSQL named) and easily probed in interview.
strengths: Current hands-on TypeScript/Node.js + AI-agent/MCP work directly matches stack
15+ years across full stack with React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes
Strong engineering rigor: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, workshops and OSS
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned (Java only) for the secondary backend track
Education entry (IIT Bombay 2009–2012) overlaps with concurrent Romania-based work and warrants verification

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience matches niche requirement
Deep TS/Node + React fullstack history exceeds 6+ year bar
Missing explicit Nest.js / Vitest / PostgreSQL coverage
